name: Cambex Corporation
summary: Cambex Corporation provides storage solutions and memory products for various corporations and agencies worldwide. The company offers storage caching appliances, fiber channel storage area network (SAN) solutions, fiber channel host bus adapters, fiber channel hubs, Failover software, and server memory products. It also provides SAN Optima, a consulting service that enhances the productivity of storage networks; and mainframe rehosting services. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Southborough, Massachusetts.
